message:
fix(core): negative LIMIT/OFFSET handling in postprocess path

LIMIT -1 should mean unlimited (return all rows), but the code cast the
negative i64 directly to usize, producing a huge value that effectively
truncated results to 0 rows. Similarly, negative OFFSET was cast to a huge
usize, skipping past all rows.

Now: negative LIMIT returns all rows (with offset still applied), negative
OFFSET is treated as 0.

2 regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
